creator: goldii@ya.ru
text:
I updated buildah to 1.36.0_3 and tested this code
locally and on a remote freebsd 14.1 system

# c=$(buildah from quay.io/dougrabson/busybox)
# buildah run $c ls

from https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/5580

I've gotten an error:

panic: runtime error: invalid memory address or nil pointer dereference
[signal SIGSEGV: segmentation violation code=0x1 addr=0x68 pc=0x1aea6c0]

goroutine 1 [running]:
github.com/containers/buildah.(*Builder).addResolvConfEntries(0x1cc000136e00, {0x1cc000172ea0, 0x24}, {0x0, 0x0, 0x0}, 0x0, 0x0, 0x1)
	/var/tmp/tmpfs-ports/usr/ports/sysutils/buildah/work/buildah-1.36.0/run_common.go:93 +0xc0
github.com/containers/buildah.(*Builder).Run(_, {_, _, _}, {0x0, {0x0, 0x0}, 0x0, {0x1cc00012b990, 0x7}, ...})
	/var/tmp/tmpfs-ports/usr/ports/sysutils/buildah/work/buildah-1.36.0/run_freebsd.go:247 +0x176d
main.runCmd(_, {_, _, _}, {0x0, {0x1e1e460, 0x0, 0x0}, {0x1e1e460, 0x0, ...}, ...})
	/var/tmp/tmpfs-ports/usr/ports/sysutils/buildah/work/buildah-1.36.0/cmd/buildah/run.go:192 +0xa58
main.init.23.func1(0x1cc0000d8900?, {0x1cc000489080?, 0x4?, 0x4c9613?})
	/var/tmp/tmpfs-ports/usr/ports/sysutils/buildah/work/buildah-1.36.0/cmd/buildah/run.go:55 +0x7b
github.com/spf13/cobra.(*Command).execute(0x1cc000035200, {0x1cc000489020, 0x2, 0x2})
	/var/tmp/tmpfs-ports/usr/ports/sysutils/buildah/work/buildah-1.36.0/vendor/github.com/spf13/cobra/command.go:983 +0xabc
github.com/spf13/cobra.(*Command).ExecuteC(0x1d39b80)
	/var/tmp/tmpfs-ports/usr/ports/sysutils/buildah/work/buildah-1.36.0/vendor/github.com/spf13/cobra/command.go:1115 +0x3ff
github.com/spf13/cobra.(*Command).Execute(...)
	/var/tmp/tmpfs-ports/usr/ports/sysutils/buildah/work/buildah-1.36.0/vendor/github.com/spf13/cobra/command.go:1039
main.main()
	/var/tmp/tmpfs-ports/usr/ports/sysutils/buildah/work/buildah-1.36.0/cmd/buildah/main.go:236 +0x48
